config.script:
table = self.getSibling('Table')
selectedRows = getattr(table.props, 'selectedRows', None)
if selectedRows is None:
    selectionProps = getattr(table.props, 'selection', None)
    if selectionProps is not None:
        selectedRows = getattr(selectionProps, 'selectedRows', None)
        if selectedRows is None:
            selectedRows = getattr(selectionProps, 'selectedRow', None)
if selectedRows is None:
    selectedIndex = getattr(table.props, 'selectedRow', None)
    selectedRows = [selectedIndex] if selectedIndex is not None else []
if not selectedRows:
    system.perspective.addMessage('Select at least one row before exporting.', 'error')
    raise ValueError('No rows selected')
if isinstance(selectedRows, int):
    selectedRows = [selectedRows]
data = table.props.data
if data is None or data.rowCount == 0:
    system.perspective.addMessage('No data available to export.', 'error')
    raise ValueError('No data to export')
columns = list(data.columnNames)
rows = []
for rowIndex in selectedRows:
    row = []
    for colIndex in range(data.columnCount):
        row.append(data.getValueAt(rowIndex, colIndex))
    rows.append(row)
exportDs = system.dataset.toDataSet(columns, rows)
output = system.dataset.toExcel(exportDs)
path = r'C:\Users\braiden.goodey\OneDrive - Thermo Fisher Scientific\Desktop\HERE\selected_rows_export.xlsx'
system.file.writeFileBytes(path, output)
system.perspective.addMessage('Export complete: ' + path, 'information')
